identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a 'Midnight Research Lab' aesthetic that feels precise, biological, and deep. Avoid generic medical blue. Use darkness to make data glow.
principles: Darkness is the canvas; Data is the light.
Asymmetry creates interest; Grids create order.
Motion should feel like a heartbeat or a brainwave - organic and rhythmic.
Typography is the voice of authority.

secondary.name: Inter
secondary.usage: Body text, UI elements, Dense data

mono.name: JetBrains Mono
mono.usage: Code snippets, Raw CSV data, Technical metrics

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 font-semibold tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/10 text-secondary hover:bg-secondary/20 border border-secondary/20 transition-all

cards.base: bg-card border border-border/40 relative overflow-hidden group

charts.customization: Custom Tooltips with glassmorphism. Hidden cartesian grids (or very subtle). Glowing lines (drop-shadow filter on SVG paths).
charts.hypnogram_style: Step charts with filled areas opacity 0.2, stroke width 2.

navigation.style: Floating Island or Sticky Top with Glassmorphism
navigation.classes: fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] max-w-5xl z-50 rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md px-6 py-3 shadow-2xl

images.description: Abstract purple/blue brain waves for main hero background
Wavy lines data visualization for 'Deep Analysis' section
Contextual image for 'How it works' or research context

accessibility.contrast_check: APCA preferred. Ensure text on dark backgrounds is at least Zinc-300 or lighter.
accessibility.interactive_states: Focus rings must be visible (use ring-2 ring-primary).
accessibility.chart_accessibility: Use patterns or textures in addition to color for sleep stages if possible, or ensure high contrast difference.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Theme: Enforce DARK MODE as default in tailwind.config.js. Do not rely on system preference initially.
3. Layout: Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the main dashboard. It's the core of the experience.
4. Components: Create a reusable 'GlassCard' component that implements the border and background styles defined.
5. Visualization: The Hypnogram is the hero. Spend time making it interactive (hover for details).
6. Cleanliness: Remove all default shadows. Use glows (colored shadows) sparingly for active states only.

universal_guidelines.design_philosophy: Anti-AI Slop. No generic gradients. No centered text blocks without purpose. Deep, rich, scientific.
universal_guidelines.spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 for internal card padding. Don't crowd the data.
universal_guidelines.interactivity: Every chart point should have a tooltip. Every card should respond to hover.
